articles.title: Connolly fights off cramps in innings of a lifetime
articles.description: Left hander warded off cramps in Dhaka's searing heat to play one of the great ODI innings and lead Australia to a nervy one-wicket win over Bangladesh

articles.title: Holder completes heist for West Indies after Joseph picks up five
articles.description: Sherfane Rutherford, Shimron Hetmyer and Rovman Powell play their parts with the bat as West Indies overhaul Sri Lanka's 169 to take the series 2-1

articles.title: Connolly's 149 helps Australia survive Shoriful's six-for in one-wicket thriller
articles.description: Australia scraped home by one wicket to avoid a 3-0 series sweep

articles.title: Campbelle repays the faith to stun defending champions
articles.description: Missing two key players West Indies needed someone to stand up and the No. 3 did so in dramatic style

articles.title: Campbelle, Matthews outmuscle New Zealand to land famous victory
articles.description: Dismal fielding effort sinks defending champions in nailbiter at Hampshire Bowl

articles.title: Gill, Rahul seal India's chase for 1-0 lead after Gurbaz century
articles.description: Gurbaz's 102 off 51 went in vain as the rest of the Afghanistan batters managed just 80 runs together

articles.title: Kathryn Bryce's all-round heroics lead Scotland to maiden T20 World Cup win
articles.description: She followed up a 39-ball 60 with two wickets in a captain's performance

articles.title: Wyatt-Hodge century drives England to statement victory in tournament opener
articles.description: Freya Kemp starred with four wickets, as Sciver-Brunt makes emphatic return from injury

articles.title: Kane Williamson retires from international cricket
articles.description: New Zealand's record run-scorer opts out of completing ongoing Test series in England

articles.title: Keith Piper, Warwickshire's treble-winning wicketkeeper, dies aged 56
articles.description: Piper claimed more than 500 catches in a 200-match first-class career, and was integral to treble-winning season in 1994

articles.title: Women’s T20 World Cup 2026: ‘We need to play positive & fearless cricket’ - Wahab Riaz calls for patience as Pakistan adapt to aggressive approach
articles.description: "You cannot make a lot of changes into the way they have been playing and to change the pattern of the way they were playing before and now. So obviously it will take some time," said Wahab.

articles.title: Big Bash League operations with revamped model approved by Cricket Australia
articles.description: The chairs provided their in-principle support of a self-determination model for private investment to be introduced into the game to be taken back to their individual boards for further discussion.

articles.title: IND vs AFG 2026: R Ashwin praises selectors after Gurnoor Brar's stellar debut
articles.description: Brar bowled at a high pace, clocking over 145 kmph regularly. He finished with figures of 3 for 27 and picked up his first wicket with just his fifth ball in international cricket.

articles.title: ENG vs NZ 2026: Ollie Robinson ruled out of second Test, hopeful of Nottingham return
articles.description: Robinson had marked his return to the England Test setup in spectacular fashion during the opening Test at Lord’s, producing a match-winning display with seven wickets.

articles.title: Winning a series against Australia is a massive milestone for Bangladesh, says Mehidy Hasan Miraz
articles.description: "Overall, I am very satisfied. These are exactly the things that feel good as a captain. Playing well against a team like Australia is a huge opportunity," said Mehidy.

articles.title: BPL must address payment issues to improve global standing, says Lisa Sthalekar
articles.description: Lisa Sthalekar has said that the Bangladesh Premier League (BPL) must improve its overall standards if it hopes to attract and retain top overseas players.

articles.title: Cambodia forced to forfeit ACC Challenger Cup after visa denials
articles.description: Three Cambodian players were denied visas upon arrival in Singapore, while a fourth player suffered an injury, leaving the squad without enough available players to compete.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: 'We saw it coming' - Scotland's Katherine Fraser after historic win against Ireland
articles.description: Scotland Women, making their second appearance in ICC T20 World Cups, recorded their first-ever win in the competition with a 40-run victory against Ireland Women.
